content.en:
"Three Ancestors, a cultivator named Endless Heavenly Ancestor has come to our Dragon Snake Sea, and he said that he has a large number of Dragon Snake Stones and wants to trade with us!"

An ancient dragon snake reported.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, isn't this the primordial-level genius who has made a lot of noise in the Ancient God Realm recently!"

Nine Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Dragon Snake Shendu said lightly.

Although the primeval dragon snake doesn't go out much, they still have their own channels for information from the outside world.

Therefore, the news of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, an ancient-level genius, was still known to Shendu.

"Since it's an ancient-level genius, let's meet it, besides, he also said that he has a dragon snake stone, if it's true, he can also trade it. Another Nine-Time Blood Transformation Realm creature Gu Zun said.

Subsequently, they asked the primeval dragon snake guards to bring Ye Tian with them.

......

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, the three ancestors of our Ancient Dragon Snake want to see you!"

Several primeval dragon snake guards took Ye Tian into the depths of the Dragon Snake Sea, and soon came to the Dragon Snake Mountain where the three primeval dragon snake ancestors were located.

After Ye Tian came here, he saw three incomparably huge primeval dragon snakes, this was still their shrunken body, otherwise the size would be extremely terrifying.

"I've seen the three seniors of Shendu, Guzun, and Tai Crocodile!"

Ye Tian said very politely.

Shendu saw Ye Tian and asked, "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you are an ancient-level genius, we have heard about it a long time ago, what are you doing in our Ancient Dragon and Snake Clan?"

"Deal!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and a pile of dragon and snake stones appeared, "I have a lot of dragon and snake stones in my hand, and I want to trade the ancient gold blood stored by the primeval dragon and snake clan." "

"Dragon Snake Stone!"

Shendu and they checked it carefully, it was indeed a real dragon snake stone, although it was not clear how Ye Tian obtained so many dragon snake stones, but such a transaction was only good for them, and there was no harm.

"Okay!" Shendu agreed, "These dragon snake stones can only be traded for more than 10,000 drops of primeval golden blood!"

"No, I have more dragon snake stones, I'm just showing you here!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"There are many more dragon snake stones!!!"

Shendu and they are excited, if there are more dragon snake stones, they can cultivate more powerful primeval dragon snakes!

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, how much primeval golden blood you want, we have it!"

Kamito said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian officially traded with the Ancient Dragon and Snake Clan, and he took out the number of Dragon and Snake Stones that made the Ancient Dragon and Snake Clan jaw-dropping, and also traded a large amount of Ancient Golden Blood from the Ancient Dragon Snake.

"Close to a million drops of primeval golden blood!"

Ye Tian left with these primeval golden blood.

The Ancient Dragon and Snake Clan must have more Ancient Golden Blood, and they have even mastered the method of cultivating Ancient Golden Blood.

The primeval demon ape clan can cultivate so much primeval golden blood, and the primeval dragon and snake clan can naturally do it too.

Therefore, no one knows how much Ancient Gold Blood the Ancient Dragon and Snake Clan has.

But Ye Tian didn't need to trade too much, a million drops of Ancient Golden Blood was enough for him to use.

......

Universal City.

After Ye Tian brought back the Ancient Golden Blood, he began to cultivate the Ancient Blood Spear with all his might.

It was indeed very difficult to cultivate the second primeval technique, and one failure in cultivation made Ye Tian fail continuously.

However, he can replicate his body again and again, so he doesn't care about these losses.

Time flies, the ancient golden blood is constantly consumed by Ye Tian, and his understanding of the ancient art is getting deeper and deeper.

Ten thousand drops of primeval gold blood were used, but he still hadn't comprehended the primeval blood spear, so he continued to cultivate.

100,000 drops of ancient gold blood consumed!

200,000 drops of Ancient Gold Blood consumed!

300,000 drops of ancient gold blood consumed!

With the consumption of a large amount of Ancient Golden Blood, Ye Tian also had a lot of understanding, and his comprehension of the Ancient Blood Spear had reached an extremely high level, and he was about to become an Ancient Blood Spear.

Long years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian had consumed 760,000 drops of Ancient Golden Blood, and he was finally about to comprehend the Ancient Blood Spear.

Airplanes!!!!

An Ancient Blood Spear slowly condensed from Ye Tian's hand, exuding the power of the Ancient Technique.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body began to transform, becoming more powerful than before, but it had not yet reached a very exaggerated level.

And the heart, which was about to be tempered to the fourth Blood Transformation Realm, needed to be tempered for a longer time.

But Ye Tian didn't care about this, he was only excited, because his strength had skyrocketed.

With his current strength, if he fought against the Hays Heavenly Ancestor in the Ancient God Realm, he could kill the Hays Heavenly Ancestor in a short period of time, which was the terrifying thing about mastering the two primeval techniques.

"If Hayes Heavenly Ancestor knew that I had cultivated the Ancient Blood Spear, he would probably be confused!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He didn't expose the matter immediately, after all, it was too fast to say it now.

The time given to him by Hayes Heavenly Ancestor is ten primeval epochs, and the primeval epoch in the territorial sea boundary is also a very long time, and he has not even crossed a single primeval epoch now!

Therefore, he was not in a hurry to change back to the Taikoo Gold Leaf.

"The next thing is to raise my cultivation to five Blood Transformation Realms, in that case, my battle can definitely be called invincible in the Seven Blood Transformation Realms, and only eight Blood Transformation Realm creatures can kill me!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, he continued to acquire more treasure resources that would help refine his heart, and he didn't care about the consumption of Taikoo Gold at all.

Whenever there is such a resource for the Blood Transformation Realm to sell, he will buy it as soon as possible.

Moreover, he has also been collecting Taiyuan gold water in Taiyuan Mountain, so the heart refining speed is still okay.

Time flies, Ye Tian has been refining his heart, and he has spent an unknown amount of resources.

100 million years of the first year!

The first year of the billion!

In the blink of an eye, more than eight billion realms have passed!

According to the time division of the territorial sea boundary seam, an archaean era is equivalent to the first year of the 100 billion realm.

And Ye Tian only spent eight billion years in the first year of the realm, and once again tempered his heart to the extreme of the four blood transformation realms, he was only one step away from the five blood transformation realms!

Of course, at this point, he once again fell into a bottleneck.

......

Somewhere in the boundary of the territorial waters.

Ye Tian practiced two primeval techniques here.

He tried to pry the bottleneck with two primeval techniques, tearing the shackles of the four Blood Transformation Realms and the five Blood Transformation Realms.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian used the Ancient God and Demon Fist to hold the Ancient Blood Spear and practiced in the Void Gap in the Territorial Sea Realm.

Tear !!!

The shock current flowed turbulently under Ye Tian's blow, affecting the countless void areas around it.

He felt it carefully and used this power to induce the existence of a bottleneck.

He didn't know how many times he had cast the Ancient Technique, bridging the bottleneck.

Finally—

"Break my !!"

Click!

The bottleneck was broken through, and the heart ushered in a metamorphosis!
